paths.name: Agent
paths.summary: A path for subtle operators who win through observation, misdirection, and perfectly timed strikes. Specialties: Investigator (reading people and solving mysteries), Spy (false identities and infiltration), Thief (risk-taking, dirty fighting, and larceny).

paths.name: Envoy
paths.summary: A path for steadfast speakers who bolster allies and defuse enemies through force of conviction. Specialties: Diplomat (challenging and pacifying opponents), Faithful (sustaining allies' focus and resolve), Mentor (teaching, guiding, and reviving companions).

paths.name: Hunter
paths.summary: A path for relentless pursuers who mark a quarry and take it down with ranged precision, lethal stealth, or traps and animal partners. Specialties: Archer (ranged combat and mobility), Assassin (ambushes and finishing strikes), Tracker (traps, foraging, and an animal companion).

paths.name: Leader
paths.summary: A path for commanders who direct allies with a command die and turn battles through coordination, logistics, or intrigue. Specialties: Champion (leading from the front), Officer (troop coordination and supply), Politico (rumor, division, and deception).
